title: The MKUltra Project
author: CIA (declassified)
content: The theory argues that the government conducted illegal, mind-control experiments on unsuspecting citizens.
action: History proves institutions will use unethical methods for behavioral control.

title: The Voynich Manuscript
author: Unknown
content: The theory suggests this undecipherable 15th-century book contains hidden alchemical or extraterrestrial knowledge.
action: Unsolved ciphers naturally become magnets for theories of hidden wisdom.

title: The Denver Airport Murals
author: Online communities
content: The theory posits that the airport’s apocalyptic-themed artwork contains hidden messages about coming societal collapse.
action: Ominous public art often acts as a Rorschach test for societal fears.

title: The Tunguska Energy Weapon
author: Alternative science
content: The theory claims Nikola Tesla accidentally destroyed the Siberian wilderness with a wireless energy beam.
action: The genius of fringe scientists makes their involvement in disasters seem plausible.

title: The Secret Space Program
author: Whistleblowers
content: The theory suggests that a technologically advanced, off-planet military branch operates independently of civilian control.
action: Massive black-budget spending suggests the existence of hidden high-tech capabilities.
